rules.name: Optimized texture derivative should exist for raster sources
rules.message: Optimized texture derivative (.tx) is missing for a raster source texture.
rules.why: Missing .tx derivatives increase render startup cost, texture IO, and farm memory pressure. Raster sources should have a matching optimized derivative when policy tracks them.

rules.name: Optimized texture derivative should be fresh
rules.message: Optimized texture derivative is stale compared with its source texture.
rules.why: Stale .tx derivatives can render older pixels than the source texture and make local lookdev diverge from farm rendering.

rules.name: UDIM optimized texture tiles should exist
rules.message: One or more UDIM .tx tiles are missing for a raster UDIM source texture.
rules.why: Partial UDIM .tx coverage causes farm renders to fall back to heavy source tiles or fail tile lookup. All published UDIM source tiles should have matching .tx tiles.
